articles.title: Binance Launchpool Rolls Out Staking and Trading Support for New Layer-1 Blockchain Project
articles.description: Top global crypto exchange Binance is planning on launching trading support for another new layer-1 altcoin project via its Launchpool platform. Binance Launchpool, which lets users stake coins to farm new assets, says its 52nd project will be Omni Network (OMNI), a network that aims to integrate Ethereum’s (ETH) rollup ecosystem into a single, unified […]
